name: Priya S.
program: Parent of a Jr. KG student
text: Evergreen has been a second home for my child. The teachers are caring and the programmes are excellent. My child has shown tremendous growth in both academic and social skills.

name: Rahul M.
text: The daycare programme has been a lifesaver for our family. My child loves going there every day! The staff is professional and the facilities are excellent.

name: Anjali K.
program: Parent of a Sr. KG student
text: We've seen tremendous growth in our child's social and academic skills since joining Evergreen. The curriculum is well-structured and the teachers are very supportive.

name: Deepak R.
text: The staff at Evergreen are incredibly attentive and caring. My daughter has flourished in their nurturing environment. Highly recommended for working parents.

name: Meera J.
program: Parent of a Sr. KG student
text: Excellent curriculum and dedicated teachers! My son has developed amazing social skills and loves learning here. The facilities are clean and well-maintained.

name: Suresh V.
text: We moved to this area recently and Evergreen has made the transition so smooth for our child. The teachers are patient and understanding. Great communication with parents too!
